description: Web search + single-page fetch for agents. Pick a scheme: key-free hosted MCP (Exa/Parallel), self-hosted SearXNG, or keyed Tavily/Brave. web_fetch works with no config.
author: tianshu-ai

fields.label: Search scheme
fields.description: Which backend web_search uses. "hosted" needs no key (uses Exa/Parallel free MCP endpoints). "searxng" needs a base URL below. "tavily"/"brave" need the matching API key. web_fetch always works regardless of this setting.

fields.label: Hosted backend
fields.description: Only used when scheme = hosted. Which free MCP endpoint to query. Both work anonymously; add a key below only if you have one and want higher limits.

fields.label: SearXNG base URL
fields.description: Only used when scheme = searxng. Base URL of your SearXNG instance (its JSON API must be enabled: `search.formats: [json]` in settings.yml). No API key needed.

fields.label: Exa API key (optional)
fields.description: Optional. Only used when scheme = hosted and backend = Exa. Raises limits; the free endpoint works without it. Stored under <tenant>/secrets/, never returned to the browser.

fields.label: Parallel API key (optional)
fields.description: Optional. Only used when scheme = hosted and backend = Parallel. Raises limits; the free endpoint works without it.

fields.label: Tavily API key
fields.description: Only used when scheme = tavily. Sign up at tavily.com (free tier 1000 searches/month). Stored under <tenant>/secrets/, never returned to the browser.

fields.label: Brave Search API key
fields.description: Only used when scheme = brave. Get a free key at api-dashboard.search.brave.com (2000/month).

fields.label: Per-request timeout
fields.description: Network timeout for each web_search / web_fetch call. Increase if you hit timeouts on slow networks.
